requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport Safety Testing — UN 38.3

summary.en: All lithium batteries and modules shipped internationally require UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 testing (T1–T8). UN 3480 and UN 3481 classification is used for transport documents depending on whether batteries ship alone or with equipment. The EU transport stack commonly applies ADR for road, IMDG for sea, and IATA DGR for air, with Marsaxlokk and Valletta being common ports/entry points in practical Malta logistics chains.
summary.zh: 所有国际运输的锂电池和模块都须符合《联合国危险货物运输建议书》测试与标准（第三部分第38.3节）T1–T8要求。按是否单独运输或与设备一并运输分别使用UN 3480与UN 3481进行分类。马耳他物流实践中常见入境口岸包括马尔萨什克港和瓦莱塔，陆路/公路采用ADR，海运采用IMDG，空运采用IATA DGR。
summary.zht: 所有國際運輸的鋰電池和模組都須符合《聯合國危險貨物運輸建議書》（第三部分第38.3節）T1–T8要求。按是否單獨運輸或與設備一併運輸分別使用UN 3480與UN 3481進行分類。馬耳他物流實務中常見入境口岸包括馬爾薩什克港和瓦萊塔，陸路／公路採用ADR，海運採用IMDG，空運採用IATA DGR。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3
UN Model Regulations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods 23rd revised edition
ADR 2025 — European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road

summary.en: China requires equivalent UN 38.3-safe testing output for export. Domestic transport and customs processes reference GB 15599 (lithium battery transport) and JT/T 617, while customs and logistics rely on accepted dangerous-goods declaration workflows for sea and air. Chinese exporters commonly generate UN 38.3 evidence for export lines, but Maltese/EU entries still require shipment-by-shipment completeness.
summary.zh: 中国对出口同样要求UN 38.3等效安全测试输出。国内运输和报关流程引用GB 15599（锂电池运输）及JT/T 617，海空运则依赖危险货物申报流程。中国出口商通常会生成UN 38.3证据，但马耳他/欧盟侧通常要求按每票货物完整提交完整材料。
summary.zht: 中國對出口亦要求UN 38.3等效安全測試輸出。國內運輸和報關流程引用GB 15599（鋰電池運輸）及JT/T 617，海空運則依賴危險貨物申報程序。中國出口商通常會生成UN 38.3證據，但馬耳他／歐盟側通常要求按每票貨物完整提交完整資料。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3
GB 15599 — Safety requirements for transport of lithium batteries by road
JT/T 617 — Dangerous goods road transport framework (China)

gap.en: Test protocols are largely aligned, but implementation gaps occur at documentation quality and enforcement: EU road/sea/air operators expect UN 38.3 summaries per consignment, strict package labeling and packaging updates, and EU SOC and pre-notification discipline for high-energy BESS modules. Chinese exporters should avoid generic certificates only and submit shipment-ready test packets.
gap.zh: 测试体系总体对齐，但文件质量与执行层面存在差距：欧盟陆海空操作方要求每票货物提供UN 38.3摘要、严格标签与包装更新、以及高能量BESS模块对应的SOC与预通知要求。中国出口商应避免仅提交通用证书，需提交可供直接报关与运输的完整分单资料。
gap.zht: 測試體系整體對齊，但文件質量與執行層面存在差距：歐盟陸海空操作方要求每票貨物提供UN 38.3摘要、嚴格標籤與包裝更新、以及高能量BESS模組對應之SOC與預通知要求。中國出口商應避免僅提交通用證書，需提交可供直接報關與運輸之完整分單資料。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 and transport regulations are legal requirements for each mode and are strictly enforced at cargo acceptance points.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export and domestic handling of battery consignments where applicable under customs, transport and logistics rules.

source.publisher: International Air Transport Association (IATA) / UN dangerous-goods transport regime

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. Chinese BESS exporters to Malta should treat UN 38.3 reporting and dangerous-goods documents as shipment-critical controls, with explicit module-level summaries and customs-ready declarations for ADR/IMDG/IATA flows to Marsaxlokk/Valletta entry chains.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。中国向马耳他出口BESS时，应把UN 38.3报告和危险货物文件作为放行关键控制，按模块级提供完整摘要与可直接用于通关的ADR/IMDG/IATA文件，以匹配马尔萨什克/瓦莱塔入境流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。中國向馬耳他出口BESS時，應將UN 38.3報告和危險貨物文件作為放行關鍵控制，按模組級提供完整摘要與可直接用於通關的ADR/IMDG/IATA文件，以符合馬爾薩什克／瓦萊塔入境流程。

requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Classification, Packaging & Documentation — ADR / IMDG / IATA
requirement_topic.zh: 危险品分类、包装及文件——ADR / IMDG / IATA
requirement_topic.zht: 危險品分類、包裝及文件——ADR / IMDG / IATA

summary.en: European and Maltese logistics acceptance require proper dangerous-goods classification (UN number/class), shipping marks/labels, and transport documents for each route. Air shipments require DG transport declarations; road and sea shipments require equivalent documentation and approved packaging. For Malta, practical projects with large BESS consignments often combine ports near Marsaxlokk/Valletta with road handover, which introduces an additional re-documentation checkpoint.
summary.zh: 欧盟与马耳他物流验收要求按危险货物正确分类（UN编号/危险类别）、标识与标签，并按运输方式提交对应文件。空运需危险品运输声明，公路与海运需对应文书和合规包装。马耳他大型BESS运输项目通常采用马尔萨什克/瓦莱塔附近港口+公路段衔接方式，存在二次转运文档衔接环节。
summary.zht: 歐盟與馬耳他物流驗收要求按危險貨物正確分類（UN編號／危險類別）、標識與標籤，並按運輸方式提交對應文件。空運需危險品運輸聲明，公路與海運需對應文書和合規包裝。馬耳他大型BESS運輸項目通常採用馬爾薩什克／瓦萊塔附近港口加公路段銜接方式，存在二次轉運文件銜接環節。

standards_or_laws: ADR 2025 — Chapter 3.3 and relevant special provisions
UN Model Regulations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods

summary.en: China’s road dangerous-goods framework (JT/T series) and exporter documentation workflows provide a starting baseline, while sea/air flows often follow IMDG/IATA logic. Alignment to Malta/EU checkpoints usually requires harmonised package marks, DG declarations in accepted language/format, and full multimodal handover records.
summary.zh: 中国公路危险品框架（JT/T系列）和出口文件流程可作为起点，但海空运路径多按IMDG/IATA逻辑执行。对接马耳他/欧盟通常需要统一包装标识、按认可格式和语言提交危险品申报，并提供完整多式联运交接记录。
summary.zht: 中國公路危險品框架（JT/T系列）和出口文件流程可作為起點，但海空運路徑多按IMDG/IATA邏輯執行。對接馬耳他／歐盟通常需要統一包裝標識、按可接受格式與語言提交危險品申報，並提供完整多式聯運交接紀錄。

gap.en: The main gap is process architecture: CN exporters may rely on one-pass export packs, while EU/Malta acceptance often expects route-specific DG documentation sets, label revisions, and in some cases carrier-appointee DGSA-style control for the EU road segment. Large consignment energy thresholds may trigger extra notices in some EU Member State contexts.
gap.zh: 主要差距在流程体系：中国出口商往往采用一次性出运材料，而欧盟/马耳他验收通常要求按运输路线分套危险品文件、标签校对，有些情境下还要求欧盟公路环节配置DGSA职责。某些国家管辖区对大批量能量阈值可能触发额外预警/通知要求。
gap.zht: 主要差距在流程體系；中國出口商往往採用一次性出運資料，而歐盟／馬耳他驗收通常要求按運輸路線分套危險品文件、標籤校對，有些情況下還要求歐盟公路環節配置DGSA職能。某些國家管轄區對大能量批次門檻可能觸發額外預警／通知要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ADR/IMDG/IATA classification, documentation, and labeling obligations are legally binding for international movement and enforceable at carriers and customs points.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export under customs and logistics rules, with exact thresholds in domestic road segments defined in Chinese transport enforcement bulletins.

source.publisher: European Union transport and dangerous-goods legal references

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. Chinese BESS cargoes to Malta generally need complete shipment packets for each mode and each consignment: valid UN numbers, labels, SDS, DG declaration, and EU road-entry documentation. Build these into pre-shipment operations early to reduce cargo holds.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。中国BESS货物向马耳他通常需要对每种运输方式和每票货物准备完整资料包：有效UN编号、标签、SDS、危险品申报及欧盟公路接续文件。应将其提前纳入出货前流程，以避免查验滞留。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。中國BESS貨物向馬耳他通常需要對每種運輸方式和每票貨物準備完整資料包：有效UN編號、標籤、SDS、危險品申報及歐盟公路銜接文件。應將其提前納入出貨前流程，以避免查驗滯留。
